query:
-- Apply $15/month to all 4G SIM/Backup/Failover services that have $0 cost
-- These are Vocus or TIAB 4G SIM products with no supplier-matched price
UPDATE services
SET 
  monthlyCost = 15.00,
  discoveryNotes = CONCAT(
    COALESCE(discoveryNotes, ''),
    ' | [DEFAULT COST APPLIED] 4G SIM default cost $15.00/mo (Vocus/TIAB - no supplier price detected)'
  )
WHERE (
  planName LIKE '%4G%Backup%'
  OR planName LIKE '%4G%Failover%'
  OR planName LIKE '%4G%SIM%'
  OR planName LIKE '%Failover SIM%'
  OR planName LIKE '%Backup SIM%'
  OR planName LIKE '%SIM Backup%'
  OR planName LIKE '%4G Back up%'
  OR planName LIKE '%4G Failover%'
  OR planName LIKE '%4G Data Backup%'
)
AND monthlyCost = 0.00
AND (discoveryNotes IS NULL OR discoveryNotes NOT LIKE '%DEFAULT COST APPLIED%');

-- Also apply to the $49 placeholder cost ones (Fast Cut, Bracken Ridge, True Metal, Active Living, Nicki's, Swara)
-- These were identified in previous session as 4G SIM products with $49 placeholder
UPDATE services
SET 
  monthlyCost = 15.00,
  discoveryNotes = CONCAT(
    COALESCE(discoveryNotes, ''),
    ' | [DEFAULT COST APPLIED] 4G SIM default cost $15.00/mo applied (replaced $49 placeholder - Vocus/TIAB - no supplier price detected)'
  )
WHERE (
  planName LIKE '%4G Data Backup Service%'
  OR planName LIKE '%4G Failover SIM%'
  OR planName LIKE '%4G SIM Backup Internet Service%'
  OR planName LIKE '%4G Data Backup%'
  OR planName LIKE '%Managed Voice Support%'
)
AND monthlyCost = 49.00
AND (discoveryNotes IS NULL OR discoveryNotes NOT LIKE '%DEFAULT COST APPLIED%');

-- Summary of what was updated
SELECT 
  planName,
  COUNT(*) as serviceCount,
  SUM(monthlyRevenue) as totalRevenue,
  SUM(monthlyCost) as totalCost,
  ROUND(AVG(monthlyCost), 2) as avgCost
FROM services
WHERE discoveryNotes LIKE '%DEFAULT COST APPLIED%'
GROUP BY planName
ORDER BY serviceCount DESC;

    ' | [DEFAULT COST APPLIED] 4G SIM default cost $15.00/mo applied (replaced $49 placeholder - Vocus/TIAB - no supplier price detected)'

WHERE (

AND monthlyCost = 49.00

-- Summary of what was updated
SELECT 
  planName,

  SUM(monthlyRevenue) as totalRevenue,
  SUM(monthlyCost) as totalCost,
  ROUND(AVG(monthlyCost), 2) as avgCost
FROM services
WHERE discoveryNotes LIKE '%DEFAULT COST APPLIED%'
GROUP BY planName
ORDER BY serviceCount DESC;
